programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Afternoon Tea
programme.desc: Contestants are split into 2 teams and are tasked with hosting afternoon tea for 100 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pub Lunch
programme.desc: Nine contestants on the losing team face elimination challenges that include three knockout rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: George Negus, Rachael Finch, and Ryan Katich take on the challenges of the MasterChef Kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: Heat 6 - Fuzzy Agolley, Alex Lloyd and Peter Rowsthorn. Lloyd moved on to semi-finals.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP7
programme.desc: The first semi-final consisted of the six semi-finalists competing in an individual Mystery Box challenge

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP8
programme.desc: The celebrities are at the Shangri-La hotel Altitude restaurant, they must prepare and cater to customers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 5
programme.desc: In a masterclass edition, Gary cooks a succulent roasted pork rack with braised vegetables.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box & Seafood from Around the World with Rick Stein
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are given a single egg and asked to make it the hero of their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Greek Salad
programme.desc: Characters: 0 | Words: 0 Dalvinder, Audra and Andrew are given 3.5 hours to reproduce George's 'Greek Salad'.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP1
programme.desc: Fifty talented home cooks from around the country compete for just 24 MasterChef aprons.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP2
programme.desc: At the MasterChef kitchen, the Top 24 contestants face a mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP3
programme.desc: The Top 16 contestants move into the MasterChef house then face a fish challenge in the MasterChef kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP4
programme.desc: The Top 15 contestants must replicate a gourmet egg dish created by award-winning Auckland chef Simon Wright.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP5
programme.desc: The Top 14 contestants face a mystery box challenge in which they must cook one savoury and one sweet dish.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP6
programme.desc: The contestants must reinvent one of three classic dishes – macaroni cheese, roast lamb or trifle.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP7
programme.desc: The contestants face their first team challenge and first full service

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 06 - EP8
programme.desc: The contestants tackle a ‘heads and tails’ challenge in which they must cook lesser-known cuts of meat.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Mystery Box & Adriano Zumba Elimination
programme.desc: The Top 50 contestants arrive on Cockatoo Island for the first day of MasterChef 2011.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Part 2
programme.desc: The remaining 45 contestants arrive on Cockatoo Island and meet new regular MasterChef judge, Matt Moran.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Part 3
programme.desc: After last night's elimination, contestants cook off for the first 6 spots in the MasterChef Top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Top 50: Part 4
programme.desc: The bottom 10 from yesterday's challenge arrive at the Passenger Wharf to hear what today's challenge is.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Castaway Cook-Off
programme.desc: The final 30 contestants cook with their 5 favourite ingredients to create their ultimate Desert Island Dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 1
programme.desc: The first Masterclass of Season 3 sees Danielle, Jay, Cleo & Seamus visiting Maggie Beer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - The Final Test
programme.desc: There are 24 contestants still fighting on – half of them will stay and half will go.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - The First Day
programme.desc: Our Top 24 have been chosen and arrive at the MasterChef kitchen for the first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 1
programme.desc: After winning the first challenge at MCK, Hayden faces off against apprentice chef Alex Keen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - The Big Bake-Off
programme.desc: Our Top 24 are woken in the night by George to be told they will be baking bread at Sonoma bakery.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Day
programme.desc: The winning Blue Team head off to their reward lunch at Jonah’s in Palm Beach.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 2
programme.desc: The Barossa Boot Camp comes to an end with a MasterClass featuring great local produce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 1
programme.desc: Our 23 contestants are still pretty fresh faced and face their first ever Mystery Box in the kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 1
programme.desc: The bottom three from yesterday’s Rabbit mystery box face off in the first pressure test at MCK.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - EP15
programme.desc: Contestant Jay has won the right to compete for Immunity against Four in Hand chef, Colin Fassnidge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants cook for up to 700 punters at one of Sydney’s busiest and largest pubs on a hot summer’s day.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Day
programme.desc: After the boys lost the Short Order Offsite challenge, all 11 team members face elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 3
programme.desc: Gary and George host a masterclass for the contestants on the art of cooking a great rabbit.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Mystery Box Challenge 2
programme.desc: Contestants compete in teams of three in a mixture of the Invention Test and Mystery Box.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 2
programme.desc: Chelsea, Rachel and Ellie recreate an Australianised pork with fried rice, without the aid of a recipe.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 3
programme.desc: Peter, Sun and Craig have to take on chef Adam D'Sylva from Melbourne restaurant Coda.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 2
programme.desc: The teams are tasked with catering for a busy Sunday morning at Cronulla Beach for 500 hungry nippers.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Day
programme.desc: The Blue Team are faced with a pastry skills based challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 4
programme.desc: Antonio Carluccio creates Handkerchief pasta with Ligurian Pesto.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 3
programme.desc: Contestants travel to Western Australia and the Sunrise Dam Gold Mine for a team challenge like no other.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Invention Test 2
programme.desc: The winners of the Team Challenge compete against each other at Margaret River's Clairault Winery.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 4
programme.desc: Cooking at the end of a very long jetty, Jay competes with professional chef Tony Howell.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Tinned and Frozen Challenge
programme.desc: The contestants are given the freedom to cook anything but with only tinned and frozen produce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 2
programme.desc: Andrew and Kumar face a "Fix that Dish" Challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 5
programme.desc: In tonight's MasterClass, Brendan Pratt cooks slow roasted lamb shoulder with croquettes.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Pressure Test 3
programme.desc: Jay, Dani and Ellie faced a Pressure Test set by Dan Hong, head chef at Ms. G's restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 5
programme.desc: In an immunity challenge, Danielle faces off against Nordic chef Thorsten Schmidt

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 4
programme.desc: Teams are asked to prepare six dishes with only one team member cooking at any one time.
